title: Wema Bank Improves 2023 Half Year Performance With N89.09 Billion Gross Earnings … Targets Third Quarter For Right Issue - FinancialEDGE
description: Wema Bank announces its unaudited results for Half Year ended 30th June 2023, recording improved performance with gross earnings of ₦89.09bn, which was an increase of 49% against ₦59.59bn that was recorded same period in 2022. Just as the bank targets third quarter of 2023, for its much anticipated right issue. The commercial bank Interest
html: Wema Bank announces its unaudited results for Half Year ended 30th June 2023, recording improved performance with gross earnings of ₦89.09bn, which was an increase of 49%  against ₦59.59bn that was recorded same period in 2022. Just as the bank targets third quarter of 2023, for its much anticipated right issue.
